{{出典の明記|date=2022年12月17日 (土) 10:39 (UTC)}}{{旧暦11月}} '''旧暦11月24日'''は[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#仏滅|仏滅]]である。
== できごと == * [[寛徳]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1044年]][[12月16日]]） - [[長久]]より寛徳に[[改元]]
== 誕生日 == * [[寛政]]8年（グレゴリオ暦[[1796年]][[12月22日]]） - [[鳥居耀蔵]]、[[幕臣]]（+ [[1873年]]） * 明治元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[1月6日]]） - [[高野房太郎]]、[[労働運動家]]（+ [[1904年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[文禄]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1592年]][[12月27日]]） - [[顕如]]、[[浄土真宗]]の僧・[[織田信長]]に対し挙兵（* [[1543年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124}}
[[Category:kk]][[en:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
[[sn:November 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 24일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿四]] [[zh:十一月廿四]] [[en:draft:November 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kantoku|ja|寛徳}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1044]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} より寛徳に[[改元]]
== Births == * [[Kansei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[December 22]] ） - [[鳥居耀蔵]] 、[[幕臣]] （+ [[1873]] ） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[January 6]] ） - [[高野房太郎]] 、[[労働運動家]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|文禄}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 27]] ） - [[顕如]] 、[[浄土真宗]] の僧・[[織田信長]] に対し挙兵（* [[1543]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124}}

[[sn:November 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 24일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿四]] [[zh:十一月廿四]] [[en:draft:November 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar November}} '''November 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kantoku|ja|寛徳}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1044]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} より寛徳に[[改元]]
== Births == * [[Kansei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[December 22]] ） - [[鳥居耀蔵]] 、{{ill|Bakushin|ja|幕臣}} （+ [[1873]] ） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[January 6]] ） - [[高野房太郎]] 、[[労働運動家]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 27]] ） - [[Kōsa]] 、[[Jōdo Shinshū]] のMonk・[[Oda Nobunaga]] に対し挙兵（* [[1543]] ） == See Also! ==

[[sn:November 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 11월 24일]] [[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 11월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿四]] [[zh:十一月廿四]] [[en:draft:November 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November}} the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kantoku|ja|寛徳}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1044]] [[December 16]] ） - {{ill|Chōkyū|ja|長久}} より寛徳に[[改元]]
== Births == * [[Kansei]] 8th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1796]] [[December 22]] ） - [[鳥居耀蔵]] 、{{ill|Bakushin|ja|幕臣}} （+ [[1873]] ） * 明治1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[January 6]] ） - [[高野房太郎]] 、[[労働運動家]] （+ [[1904]] ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunroku|ja|Bunroku}} 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1592]] [[December 27]] ） - [[Kōsa]] 、[[Jōdo Shinshū]] のMonk・[[Oda Nobunaga]] に対し挙兵（* [[1543]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿四]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 24''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Kantoku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1044, December 16) – The era name was changed from Chōkyū to Kantoku.
== Births == * In the 8th year of the Kansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1796, December 22) – Torii Yōzō, a military retainer, was born (died 1873). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1869, January 6) – Takano Bōtarō, a labor movement activist, was born (died 1904).
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1592, December 27) – Kōsa, a Jōdo Shinshū monk who led a revolt against Oda Nobunaga, died (born 1543).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124}}

[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十一月廿四]] {{Lunisolar November}} '''November 24''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November|12=draft}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=draft}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Kantoku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1044, December 16) – The era name was changed from Chōkyū to Kantoku.
== Births == * In the 8th year of the Kansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1796, December 22) – Torii Yōzō, a military retainer, was born (died 1873). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1869, January 6) – Takano Bōtarō, a labor movement activist, was born (died 1904).
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} 1592, December 27) – Kōsa, a Jōdo Shinshū monk who led a revolt against Oda Nobunaga, died (born 1543).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q841053]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 24|qq=November 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 24''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|qq=|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Kantoku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] 1044, December 16) – The era name was changed from Chōkyū to Kantoku.
== Births == * In the 8th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1796, December 22) – Torii Yōzō, a military retainer, was born (died 1873). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1869, January 6) – Takano Bōtarō, a labor movement activist, was born (died 1904).
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1592, December 27) – Kōsa, a Jōdo Shinshū monk who led a revolt against Oda Nobunaga, died (born 1543).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh_min_nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q841053]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 24|qq=November 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 24''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Kantoku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] 1044, December 16) – The era name was changed from Chōkyū to Kantoku.
== Births == * In the 8th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1796, December 22) – Torii Yōzō, a military retainer, was born (died 1873). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1869, January 6) – Takano Bōtarō, a labor movement activist, was born (died 1904).
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1592, December 27) – Kōsa, a Jōdo Shinshū monk who led a revolt against Oda Nobunaga, died (born 1543).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q841053]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 11th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|November 24|qq=November 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 24''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Kantoku era ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] 1044, December 16) – The era name was changed from Chōkyū to Kantoku.
== Births == * In the 8th year of the Kansei era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1796, December 22) – Torii Yōzō, a military retainer, was born (died 1873). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1869, January 6) – Takano Bōtarō, a labor movement activist, was born (died 1904).
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] 1592, December 27) – Kōsa, a Jōdo Shinshū monk who led a revolt against Oda Nobunaga, died (born 1543).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:11 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:11月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 11월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:11 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十一月廿四]][[zh:十一月廿四]]
{{Not to be confused with|November 24|qq=November 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十一月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 11월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar November|qq=}} '''November 24''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|November (Lunisolar)|ja|11月 (旧暦)|lt=November (Shimotsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/November (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 11th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}, and the day is designated as {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10886789}}.
== Events == * In the 1st year of the Kantoku era ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} 1044, December 16) – The era name was changed from Chōkyū to Kantoku.
== Births == * In the 8th year of the Kansei era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1796, December 22) – Torii Yōzō, a military retainer, was born (died 1873). * In the 1st year of the Meiji era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1869, January 6) – Takano Bōtarō, a labor movement activist, was born (died 1904).
== Deaths == * In the 1st year of the Bunroku era ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} 1592, December 27) – Kōsa, a Jōdo Shinshū monk who led a revolt against Oda Nobunaga, died (born 1543).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|11|23|11|25|10|24|12|11|1124|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
